About Me

I make brands
findable & desirable

Currently working as a Digital Marketer at Blank Pages, I specialize in brands build a strong digital footprint — from ads that perform to websites that work.

With 12+ brands across jewellery, fashion, fragrance, food, furniture, footwear and education under my belt, I bring hands-on experience across the full digital stack.

My background spans social media management, paid campaigns (Google & Meta), SEO, and CMS development across WordPress, Shopify, and Wix.
